actions.name: create_issue
actions.risk: creates user-visible GitHub issue and may notify watchers

actions.name: update_issue
actions.risk: mutates existing GitHub issue or pull request issue metadata

actions.name: comment_issue
actions.risk: creates user-visible comment and may notify participants

actions.name: close_issue
actions.risk: closes existing GitHub issue

actions.name: create_pull_request
actions.risk: creates user-visible pull request and may notify watchers/reviewers

actions.name: update_pull_request
actions.risk: mutates existing GitHub pull request

actions.name: close_pull_request
actions.risk: closes existing GitHub pull request

actions.name: request_reviewers
actions.risk: notifies requested GitHub reviewers

actions.name: merge_pull_request
actions.risk: irreversibly changes repository history unless branch protection blocks merge

actions.name: create_label
actions.risk: changes repository taxonomy used by issues and pull requests

actions.name: update_label
actions.risk: renames or changes labels already used by issues and pull requests

actions.name: delete_label
actions.risk: removes a label from the repository and existing issue metadata

actions.name: create_milestone
actions.risk: creates planning metadata visible to repository collaborators

actions.name: update_milestone
actions.risk: changes planning metadata used by issues and pull requests

actions.name: delete_milestone
actions.risk: removes repository planning metadata from GitHub

actions.name: create_release
actions.risk: publishes release metadata and may notify repository watchers

actions.name: update_release
actions.risk: changes published release metadata

actions.name: delete_release
actions.risk: removes release metadata from GitHub; tags are not deleted by this action

actions.name: dispatch_workflow
actions.risk: starts CI/CD automation that may deploy, publish, or mutate external systems

actions.name: rerun_workflow_run
actions.risk: reruns CI/CD automation and consumes workflow minutes

actions.name: cancel_workflow_run
actions.risk: interrupts in-flight CI/CD automation

actions.name: delete_workflow_run
actions.risk: removes workflow run history from GitHub

actions.name: create_pull_request_review
actions.risk: submits reviewer feedback and may approve or request changes on a pull request

actions.name: create_or_update_file

content.description: Base64-encoded file content (matches GitHub's contents API wire shape; legacy also accepts raw content via content_base64/content fallback, reproduced only for the canonical pre-encoded shape here).

actions.risk: writes a commit to the repository and may trigger CI/CD

actions.name: delete_file
actions.risk: writes a commit that removes a file from the repository

actions.name: create_webhook
actions.risk: registers an outbound webhook that will receive repository event payloads

actions.name: update_webhook
actions.risk: changes an existing webhook's target URL, secret, or event subscriptions

actions.name: delete_webhook
actions.risk: removes a webhook; the target will stop receiving repository event payloads

actions.name: create_deploy_key
actions.risk: grants a new SSH public key deploy access to the repository

actions.name: delete_deploy_key
actions.risk: revokes an SSH deploy key's access to the repository

actions.name: create_or_update_environment
actions.risk: creates or changes a deployment environment's protection rules and reviewers

actions.name: delete_environment
actions.risk: removes a deployment environment and its protection rules

actions.name: create_commit_comment
actions.risk: creates a user-visible comment attached to a specific commit

actions.name: update_commit_comment
actions.risk: changes the text of an existing commit comment

actions.name: delete_commit_comment
actions.risk: removes a commit comment

actions.name: update_issue_comment
actions.risk: changes the text of an existing issue or pull request comment

actions.name: delete_issue_comment
actions.risk: removes an issue or pull request comment

actions.name: lock_issue
actions.risk: prevents further comments from non-collaborators on an issue or pull request

actions.name: unlock_issue
actions.risk: reopens an issue or pull request to comments from non-collaborators

actions.name: set_issue_labels
actions.risk: replaces every label on an issue or pull request, removing any not listed

actions.name: add_issue_labels
actions.risk: adds labels to an issue or pull request without removing existing ones

actions.name: remove_issue_label
actions.risk: removes a single label from an issue or pull request

actions.name: add_issue_assignees
actions.risk: assigns additional GitHub users to an issue or pull request and may notify them

actions.name: remove_issue_assignees
actions.risk: removes assignees from an issue or pull request

actions.name: create_review_comment
actions.risk: creates a user-visible inline review comment on a pull request diff

actions.name: update_review_comment
actions.risk: changes the text of an existing pull request review comment

actions.name: delete_review_comment
actions.risk: removes a pull request review comment

actions.name: submit_pull_request_review
actions.risk: submits a pending pull request review, which may approve or request changes

actions.name: dismiss_pull_request_review
actions.risk: dismisses an existing pull request review, clearing its approval status

actions.name: update_pull_request_branch
actions.risk: merges the base branch into the pull request's head branch, adding a merge commit

actions.name: update_release_asset
actions.risk: changes a release asset's file name or label

actions.name: delete_release_asset
actions.risk: removes a downloadable asset from a published release

actions.name: replace_repo_topics
actions.risk: replaces the repository's entire topic list, removing any topic not listed

actions.name: add_collaborator
actions.risk: grants a GitHub user access to the repository and may send an invitation email

actions.name: remove_collaborator
actions.risk: revokes a collaborator's access to the repository

actions.name: create_ref

ref.description: Fully-qualified ref name, e.g. refs/heads/my-branch or refs/tags/v1.0.0.

actions.risk: creates a new branch or tag ref pointing at the given commit SHA

actions.name: update_ref

ref.description: Ref name relative to refs/, e.g. heads/my-branch (matches GitHub's git/refs/{ref} path convention).

actions.risk: moves an existing branch or tag ref to a different commit SHA, potentially discarding history

actions.name: delete_ref
actions.risk: permanently deletes a branch or tag ref

actions.name: merge_branch
actions.risk: creates a merge commit combining the head ref into the base branch

actions.name: update_code_scanning_alert
actions.risk: changes a code scanning alert's triage state, which can suppress a real security finding

actions.name: update_dependabot_alert
actions.risk: changes a dependabot alert's triage state, which can suppress a real vulnerability finding

actions.name: create_deployment
actions.risk: records a new deployment and may trigger CI/CD deployment automation

actions.name: create_fork
actions.risk: creates a new repository forked from this one, under the caller's account or a target organization

actions.name: create_repo_ruleset
actions.risk: creates a repository ruleset that can block pushes, merges, or deletions repo-wide once active

actions.name: update_repo_ruleset
actions.risk: changes an existing repository ruleset's enforcement or rule set, which can block pushes, merges, or deletions repo-wide

actions.name: delete_repo_ruleset
actions.risk: removes a repository ruleset, lifting any push/merge/deletion restrictions it enforced

actions.name: update_secret_scanning_alert
actions.risk: changes a secret scanning alert's triage state, which can suppress a real leaked-credential finding
